children.name: SUDS-Guided Exposure Pacing
children.description: A micro-intervention where the therapist uses real-time SUDS ratings to pace imaginal exposure: pausing only for brief regulation, prompting continuation at SUDS < 90, and reinforcing tolerance at peaks.
children.applicable_when: A micro-intervention where the therapist uses real-time SUDS ratings to pace imaginal exposure: pausing only for brief regulation, prompting continuation at SUDS < 90, and reinforcing tolerance at peaks.
selector_terms: Client reports SUDS ≥ 70 during memory narration
Client pauses mid-narrative with visible distress (sweating, tearfulness)
children.relative_path: 心理咨询/Family技能/行为主义/微技能/SUDS-Guided Exposure Pacing/SKILL.md
